headline: Raúl Castro 🍆👴 Cuffed 🔒💥 Over 1996 Plane Downings ✈️💥!
text: Raúl Castro 🍆👴 the OG Cuban Commie DADDY 😎💀 got CHARGED 🔫⚖️ by US Uncle Sam 🇺🇸💪 with CONSPIRACY TO KILL 🗡️😱 US NATIONALS and AIRCRAFT DESTRUCTION 💥✈️ over that 1996 Brothers to the Rescue plane shootdown ✈️🔫! Four souls ☠️💔 – Armando Alejandre Jr, Carlos Alberto Costa, Mario Manuel de la Peña & Pablo Morales 🕊️😢 – got YEETED 💨💥 right between Cuba & Florida 🌴🌊! Castro 🍆👴 was the ARMED FORCES BOSS 🪖🫡 back then, catching major HEAT 🔥😡 from the world! Now 94 🍰🎂 and retired, he's still the REVOLUTION SURVIVOR 🕊️🔥 bro of late Fidel Castro 🍆👴! Acting AG Todd Blanche 🕵️‍♂️📜 dropped the BOMB 💣 at Miami's Freedom Tower 🗼🍊, saying Trump 🍊👑 & the US won't FORGET its CITIZENS 🦅🇺🇸! Each murder count carries MAX DEATH ⚰️ or LIFE 🔒, and the whole case is a LEGAL SHOWDOWN ⚖️🔥 in US courts! Current Prez Miguel Díaz-Canel 🧔🇨🇺 called it a POLITICAL MANEUVER 🤡🎭 with ZERO legal vibes 🫥😤, claiming 'legit self-defense' in Cuban waters 🌊🛡️! US is CRANKING the PRESSURE 🍆🔥 with sanctions 🚫💰, oil blockade 🛢️🚫 causing blackouts ⚡😵 & food shortages 🍞😭! SecState Marco Rubio 🧔🇺🇸 called out GAESA the military CONGLOMERATE 🏭💼 for owning ports, petrol & 5-star hotels 🏨🍾, basically running the show & causing all the PAIN 😩💥! Díaz-Canel clapped back saying US is LYING 🤥😡 & punishing the Cuban people collectively 🧍‍♂️😢! Trump 🍊👑 said he's tight with Cuban-Americans 🇨🇺🇺🇸 on humanitarian vibes 🫶, while experts like William LeoGrande 🧠📚 think it's all about squeezing Cuba till they SURRENDER at the table 🪑🏳️! Similar to Maduro's Venezuela snatch 👮‍♂️🚁, but Castro's almost 95 so maybe not the same drama 🎭! Cuban exiles in Miami were THIRTY for JUSTICE 🤤⚖️, with Isela Fiterre saying it's TIME after 67 years of the murderous regime 💀😤! Mercedes Puid-Soto felt HAPPY 😍🙌 that families can CLOSE the chapter 📖✅! All eyes on whether Trump 🍊👑 uses this like Maduro for a MILITARY OP 🪖✈️ under law enforcement cover 🕵️‍♂️! Castro's grandson is chatting 🤝 but charges are likely to FREEZE those talks ❄️🧊! Cuban media BLASTED false accusations 📰💥 while US says WARRANT IS OUT 🔒📜 & Castro might show up WILLINGLY or another way 😏🚶! No one expects a normal trial 🎭 but evidence is THICC 📜💪 & everyone wants JUSTICE SERVED 🍽️⚖️! The whole thing is a CUBA-US ORGY of pressure 💦🇨🇺🇺🇸 with puns flying like planes ✈️😆!
